title: Corpus Hermeticum XIII: The Secret Discourse on Rebirth
description: Hermes teaches his son Tat the mystery of regeneration: how to silence the twelve tormentors and be reborn in God.
introduction: Hermes teaches his son Tat the mystery of regeneration: how to silence the twelve tormentors and be reborn in God.

translation.text: Tat said: In your general teachings, Father, you spoke in riddles about the divine. You did not reveal yourself, saying that no one can be saved without rebirth.
